context: Evaluates implementation of MQL static analysis that detects three common coding errors: unnecessary semicolons after closing braces, assignment operators in conditions, and unclosed string literals. The candidate must correctly handle comment exclusion and edge cases for each check.

checklist.name: Unnecessary semicolon detection
checklist.description: Flags '}; ' patterns on non-struct/class/enum lines with the correct 'unnecessary-semicolon' code and hint severity; does not flag struct/class/enum closing braces

checklist.name: Assignment-in-condition detection
checklist.description: Detects bare '=' in if/while conditions and reports 'assignment-in-condition' warning; does not flag intentional patterns where a comparison operator is also present

checklist.name: Unclosed string detection
checklist.description: Flags lines with odd quote counts (not inside block comments, not line-continuation lines) with 'unclosed-string' warning; handles multi-line strings and skips #property/#import/#resource directives

checklist.name: Comment exclusion
checklist.description: Lines inside block comments and single-line comment lines are excluded from all three checks; block comment state is tracked across lines

checklist.name: Correct diagnostic structure
checklist.description: Each returned diagnostic includes a zero-based line number, human-readable message, severity level, and diagnostic code matching the expected values
